subject: [PATCH v6 2/6] sunrpc: use per-net counts in svc_seq_show()

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch updates the svc_seq_show() function to read procedure call counts from per-network-namespace arrays instead of a global array. This change allows /proc/net/rpc/nfsd to report procedure call counts for each network namespace separately, which is useful for monitoring and debugging purposes.
